summary: Iteration 99: All 5 bug fixes VERIFIED. (1) Cinema Journal now includes poster_url - all 10 tested films have poster URLs. (2) Dashboard batch includes likeability_score (190.6), interaction_score (55.1), character_score (50.0) - NOT stuck at 50. (3) Revenue not decreasing - scheduler uses max(current_total, realistic_box_office) pattern. (4) Collect-all endpoint works correctly. (5) Dashboard shows high total_revenue ($93.4M for NeoMorpheus).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 reported bugs are now FIXED and verified: (1) cinema-journal returns poster_url, (2) dashboard/batch includes social scores, (3) scheduler uses max() to prevent revenue decrease, (4) collect-all endpoint works, (5) total_revenue shows correct values.
